## Component(s)

## Checklist

- [ ] Builds cleanly (`autoreconf -fi && ./configure && make`)
- [ ] Follows the existing naming conventions and directory structure
- [ ] No new non-standard library dependencies (or justified below)
- [ ] Updated docs if behavior or the protocol changed
- [ ] I have read [CONTRIBUTING.md](../CONTRIBUTING.md)
